chapter_title: St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
text: This chapter applies only to a municipality that has a population of more than 1,000.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 313. St. Improvements & Assessments in Certain Municipalities
##### § 313.002 — Applicability of Chapter

This chapter applies only to a municipality that has a population of more than 1,000.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter applies only to a municipality that has a population of more than 1,000.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
